name: equity-research
description: 券商/基金投研全流程工具，覆盖深度报告、行业研究、年报解读、业绩快评、调研纪要、晨会纪要、研报摘要和可比公司分析八大场景。支持连接金融数据MCP自动拉取财务/行情数据，也可纯手动输入使用。
descriptionEn: End-to-end equity research toolkit for sell-side and buy-side analysts, covering deep-dive reports, industry research, annual report analysis, earnings reviews, field research notes, morning briefings, research digests, and comparable company analysis. Connects to financial-data MCPs for automated data retrieval, or works entirely with manual inputs.
